title: Assembly of Multiple-Address Letters
plain_language_rule: Figure 8-4 shows a suggested way to assemble a multiple-address letter for signature and mailing. The manual does not prescribe a specific text-based assembly order in section 8-4 — the assembly procedure is illustrated in the figure.
source_text: 8-4 Assembly of Multiple-Address Letters. Figure 8-4 shows a suggested way to assemble a multiple-address letter for signature and mailing.
notes: This section refers entirely to Figure 8-4 for guidance. The manual uses the word 'suggested,' indicating advisory tone. No prescriptive assembly order is stated in the text. This is a mailroom-level procedure not amenable to automated validation.
